data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of 'Auto-offer when cancellation occurs', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. Specifically, there is no evidence of automatic notifications being sent to qualified substitutes upon cancellation, which is a critical requirement outlined in the linked use case. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected behavior of the system is not supported by the provided evidence.
gaps: No evidence of automatic notifications being sent to qualified substitutes upon cancellation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
